_meta.description: Cells whose real figure isn't obtainable via the automated pipeline. Each carries a short honest tag — '1/n data not found' (statutory 1/n-basis figure not public; the headline is IFRS/adjusted), 'Not in PPT' (not broken out in the investor deck), or 'IRDAI' (IRDAI/GI-Council premium pull; portal blocks bots) — plus the full reason. Grey, never a fake value; each fills the moment a real value lands. Curated 2026-06-12.
